The gold row indicates "git apply --check did not accept patch". The latest attempt (the write turn) attempted to add a line "Added a version stat to the public page." but that was earlier. That is similar to previous attempts but we need to ensure the diff is correct. But we must ensure the diff is a unified diff with correct hunk headers.
